title: Thank You
content:
We recently hit 50k supporters worldwide on Soundcloud and want to show our gratitude by putting together this mini-comp from some of our heavy hitters. Whether you have been supporting us since day one, months ago, or just discovered us, it's all love and we appreciate each and every one of you - your support will never go unnoticed.

Each of these musicians, Jeftuz, Mr. Carmack, Esta, Sango and Ta-ku we hold close as they've really paved the way for a new sound – The Sound Of Tomorrow, with their forward thinking boundary-less musical creations and have consistently made the biggest impact on Soundcloud and worldwide on behalf of the Soulection sound.

We want to thank Soundcloud for continuously supporting Soulection and the many independent sound creators worldwide for giving all of us such a game changing platform to display and communicate our music, art, and messages to you.

"Do What You Love" and the rest will follow. -Soulection Family
